const popsPage = figma.root.children.find(p => p.name === "Pops Screen");
await figma.setCurrentPageAsync(popsPage);
function decodeBase64(b64) {
  const chars = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789+/';
  const lookup = new Uint8Array(256);
  for (let i = 0; i < chars.length; i++) lookup[chars.charCodeAt(i)] = i;
  let bufLen = b64.length * 3 / 4;
  if (b64[b64.length - 1] === '=') bufLen--;
  if (b64[b64.length - 2] === '=') bufLen--;
  const arr = new Uint8Array(bufLen);
  let p = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < b64.length; i += 4) {
    const a = lookup[b64.charCodeAt(i)];
    const b = lookup[b64.charCodeAt(i + 1)];
    const c = lookup[b64.charCodeAt(i + 2)];
    const d = lookup[b64.charCodeAt(i + 3)];
    arr[p++] = (a << 2) | (b >> 4);
    if (p < bufLen) arr[p++] = ((b & 15) << 4) | (c >> 2);
    if (p < bufLen) arr[p++] = ((c & 3) << 6) | d;
  }
  return arr;
}
const mB64 = "";
const mBytes = decodeBase64(mB64);
const mImage = figma.createImage(mBytes);
const mediaFrame = figma.getNodeById("55067:12");
mediaFrame.fills = [{type: 'IMAGE', imageHash: mImage.hash, scaleMode: 'FILL'}];
return { success: true, hash: mImage.hash };
